export const ROUTES = {
    HOME: '/',
    LOGIN: '/dang-nhap',
    REGISTER: '/dang-ky',
    BOOK_DETAIL: '/sach/:id',
    CART: '/gio-hang',
    CHECKOUT: '/thanh-toan',
    ORDERS: '/don-hang',
    PROFILE: '/ho-so',
    ADMIN_DASHBOARD: '/admin',
};
